name: cash-buddy-epa
description: Cash Buddy EPA - Sistema de gestión de caja para domiciliarios (desktop + remoto vía Tailscale)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @cash-buddy/api" "npm run dev -w @cash-buddy/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cash-buddy/shared && npm run build -w @cash-buddy/web && npm run build -w @cash-buddy/api
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @cash-buddy/desktop
